items.title: S01E01 - Jeff's Life 101
items.summary: Jeff thinks he's partly paid off a debt to his father-in-law. Think again. A program for his gifted son is going to cost plenty.

infolabels.title: Jeff's Life 101
infolabels.plot: Jeff thinks he's partly paid off a debt to his father-in-law. Think again. A program for his gifted son is going to cost plenty.

items.title: S01E02 - A Non-Affair to Remember
items.summary: One of Karen's co-workers flirts with Jeff and he feels guilty until Karen's high school flame comes back to town and his jealousy takes over. Walt torments Russ after he gets stuck in a dark vent.

infolabels.title: A Non-Affair to Remember
infolabels.plot: One of Karen's co-workers flirts with Jeff and he feels guilty until Karen's high school flame comes back to town and his jealousy takes over. Walt torments Russ after he gets stuck in a dark vent.

items.title: S01E03 - The Gene Pool
items.summary: Having never learned to swim himself, Jeff believes Matt should, even though he doesn't want to.

infolabels.title: The Gene Pool
infolabels.plot: Having never learned to swim himself, Jeff believes Matt should, even though he doesn't want to.

items.title: S01E04 - Elliot and Victoria's Secret
items.summary: Kathy's dad Elliot tells Jeff a big secret about his past while on a fishing trip; Russ and Walt happily tackle a repair job at a lingerie store.

infolabels.title: Elliot and Victoria's Secret
infolabels.plot: Kathy's dad Elliot tells Jeff a big secret about his past while on a fishing trip; Russ and Walt happily tackle a repair job at a lingerie store.

items.title: S01E05 - Womb with a View
items.summary: The director of Matt's gifted program once accused Jeff of shoddy workmanship; a video of Karen giving birth gets onto the school's tape exchange.

infolabels.title: Womb with a View
infolabels.plot: The director of Matt's gifted program once accused Jeff of shoddy workmanship; a video of Karen giving birth gets onto the school's tape exchange.

items.title: S01E06 - With Two You Get Cow's Milk
items.summary: Jeff and Elliot look for a glass of milk -- straight from the cow -- when they team up for a Halloween scavenger hunt.

infolabels.title: With Two You Get Cow's Milk
infolabels.plot: Jeff and Elliot look for a glass of milk -- straight from the cow -- when they team up for a Halloween scavenger hunt.

items.title: S01E07 - Jeff & Ray & Rascal's Big Adventure
items.summary: Jeff's not an idiot, it just looks that way when he looks after Elliot's pampered pooch and restless shut-in Raymond, for whom Karen is the usual caretaker.

infolabels.title: Jeff & Ray & Rascal's Big Adventure
infolabels.plot: Jeff's not an idiot, it just looks that way when he looks after Elliot's pampered pooch and restless shut-in Raymond, for whom Karen is the usual caretaker.

items.title: S01E08 - A Sore Winner
items.summary: The Foxworthys appear on ""America's Funniest Home Videos.""

infolabels.title: A Sore Winner
infolabels.plot: The Foxworthys appear on ""America's Funniest Home Videos.""

items.title: S01E09 - He's Making a List, Checking It Twice
items.summary: When Jeff fails to set up the family's annual Christmas portrait, he gets unwitting help from country singer Travis Tritt, whose tour-bus heater he repairs.

infolabels.title: He's Making a List, Checking It Twice
infolabels.plot: When Jeff fails to set up the family's annual Christmas portrait, he gets unwitting help from country singer Travis Tritt, whose tour-bus heater he repairs.

items.title: S01E10 - Foxworthy Family Feud
items.summary: Jeff tries to remain neutral in the marital battle between Karen's sister Gayle and her husband Dennis, but Gayle uses Jeff's ambiguous advice and drops a bombshell.

infolabels.title: Foxworthy Family Feud
infolabels.plot: Jeff tries to remain neutral in the marital battle between Karen's sister Gayle and her husband Dennis, but Gayle uses Jeff's ambiguous advice and drops a bombshell.

items.title: S01E11 - Matt About You
items.summary: A note from Matt's school causes confusion when Jeff misinterprets Matt's denial of misbehaving ; Karen and Jeff double date with Gayle and her potential beau.

infolabels.title: Matt About You
infolabels.plot: A note from Matt's school causes confusion when Jeff misinterprets Matt's denial of misbehaving ; Karen and Jeff double date with Gayle and her potential beau.

items.title: S01E12 - Clan of the Bare Caves
items.summary: With Jeff's help, Gayle brings her things down from up north, while the heating-and-air business continues to head south for Jeff.

infolabels.title: Clan of the Bare Caves
infolabels.plot: With Jeff's help, Gayle brings her things down from up north, while the heating-and-air business continues to head south for Jeff.

items.title: S01E13 - Before You Say No, Just Hear Me Out
items.summary: Jeff's younger brother Wayne arrives with big ideas about how to save the business, but Jeff is eluctant to become partners with his unpredictable sibling.

infolabels.title: Before You Say No, Just Hear Me Out
infolabels.plot: Jeff's younger brother Wayne arrives with big ideas about how to save the business, but Jeff is eluctant to become partners with his unpredictable sibling.

items.title: S01E14 - Deedee Day
items.summary: Without consulting Jeff, Wayne hires his flame, a Cajun spitfire, as the shop's receptionist, and Jeff flares at the news.

infolabels.title: Deedee Day
infolabels.plot: Without consulting Jeff, Wayne hires his flame, a Cajun spitfire, as the shop's receptionist, and Jeff flares at the news.

items.title: S01E15 - He Ain't Heavy, He's a Bully
items.summary: Wayne fears someone from his past is out for revenge; and Elliot is afraid there's no limit to Lois's suddenly insatiable amorous desires.

infolabels.title: He Ain't Heavy, He's a Bully
infolabels.plot: Wayne fears someone from his past is out for revenge; and Elliot is afraid there's no limit to Lois's suddenly insatiable amorous desires.

items.title: S01E16 - Moonstruck
items.summary: Exposure to chicken pox means Matt can't be around pregnant Karen for a few days, so he and Jeff moves in with Wayne, who helps expose his nephew to the Foxworthy family's wild side.

infolabels.title: Moonstruck
infolabels.plot: Exposure to chicken pox means Matt can't be around pregnant Karen for a few days, so he and Jeff moves in with Wayne, who helps expose his nephew to the Foxworthy family's wild side.

items.title: S01E17 - Shootout at the Comedy Corral
items.summary: Wayne's success as a stand-up comic inspires Jeff to shoot from the lip to prove he's the funnier Foxworthy.

infolabels.title: Shootout at the Comedy Corral
infolabels.plot: Wayne's success as a stand-up comic inspires Jeff to shoot from the lip to prove he's the funnier Foxworthy.

items.title: S01E18 - One Wedding and a Baby
items.summary: Karen finally delivers her baby. Wayne and DeeDee decide to get married.

infolabels.title: One Wedding and a Baby
infolabels.plot: Karen finally delivers her baby. Wayne and DeeDee decide to get married.

items.title: S02E01 - Where the Donuts are Good, Not Great
items.summary: We don't have an overview translated in English. Help us expand our database by adding one.

infolabels.title: Where the Donuts are Good, Not Great
infolabels.plot: We don't have an overview translated in English. Help us expand our database by adding one.

items.title: S02E02 - The List is Strife
items.summary: To better communication, Karen suggests that she and Jeff each make lists of things for the other to work on.

infolabels.title: The List is Strife
infolabels.plot: To better communication, Karen suggests that she and Jeff each make lists of things for the other to work on.

items.title: S02E03 - The Poor Sportsmen of the Apocalypse
items.summary: Jeff and the guys head out to ""go head to head with the brutalities of nature"" â€“ and each other â€“ on a hunting trip. Karen contemplates getting rid of a newly discovered picture of (the mustached) Great Grandma ""Mee-Maw"" Foxworthy.

infolabels.title: The Poor Sportsmen of the Apocalypse

items.title: S02E04 - My Dinner with Betty
items.summary: Karen invites Bill's ex-wife, Betty, to dinner, which gets Jeff in trouble with all his friends. He's in even more trouble when Betty starts blurting out intimate details of her and Bill's marriage. Meanwhile, Matt and Nettie try to con Justin out of his money by inviting him to join their club.

infolabels.title: My Dinner with Betty
infolabels.plot: Karen invites Bill's ex-wife, Betty, to dinner, which gets Jeff in trouble with all his friends. He's in even more trouble when Betty starts blurting out intimate details of her and Bill's marriage. Meanwhile, Matt and Nettie try to con Justin out of his money by inviting him to join their club.

items.title: S02E05 - The Gift
items.summary: After Big Jim gets kicked out by one girlfriend, he lands in the arms of another, and Jeff ponders his dad's special ""gift.""

infolabels.title: The Gift
infolabels.plot: After Big Jim gets kicked out by one girlfriend, he lands in the arms of another, and Jeff ponders his dad's special ""gift.""

items.title: S02E06 - The Practical Joke
items.summary: The new boss wants Jeff to send Ebb and Candy packing, while Florus and Bill trick the pair into thinking they've won the lottery.

infolabels.title: The Practical Joke
infolabels.plot: The new boss wants Jeff to send Ebb and Candy packing, while Florus and Bill trick the pair into thinking they've won the lottery.

items.title: S02E07 - Puppy Love Triangle
items.summary: The Foxworthys worry that Matt is spending too much time with Nettie after his teacher, Miss Blosier, says he's been distracted in school lately. Turns out Matt has a crush on Miss Blosier, which becomes more complicated when Big Jim begins to turn on his charm.

infolabels.title: Puppy Love Triangle
infolabels.plot: The Foxworthys worry that Matt is spending too much time with Nettie after his teacher, Miss Blosier, says he's been distracted in school lately. Turns out Matt has a crush on Miss Blosier, which becomes more complicated when Big Jim begins to turn on his charm.

items.title: S02E08 - Like Florus, Like Son
items.summary: Upset over Jeff's strictness, Matt hits the road as a stowaway in Florus's truck.

infolabels.title: Like Florus, Like Son
infolabels.plot: Upset over Jeff's strictness, Matt hits the road as a stowaway in Florus's truck.

items.title: S02E09 - The Thanksgiving Episode
items.summary: On Thanksgiving, the Foxworthys open the door to a cornucopia of characters, despite Karen's desire to keep things simple.

infolabels.title: The Thanksgiving Episode
infolabels.plot: On Thanksgiving, the Foxworthys open the door to a cornucopia of characters, despite Karen's desire to keep things simple.

items.title: S02E10 - Merry Christmas, Y'all
items.summary: Jeff and Big Jim are arrested for cutting down a Christmas tree in a state park.

infolabels.title: Merry Christmas, Y'all
infolabels.plot: Jeff and Big Jim are arrested for cutting down a Christmas tree in a state park.

items.title: S02E11 - Feud for Thought
items.summary: Karen tries to end a long-standing family feud by inviting the rival Raffertys to dinner.

infolabels.title: Feud for Thought
infolabels.plot: Karen tries to end a long-standing family feud by inviting the rival Raffertys to dinner.

items.title: S02E12 - You Cain't Teach a Dead Dog New Tricks
items.summary: The townspeople plan an elaborate funeral for the Foxworthys' beloved dog -- to be buried in a plot alongside one earmarked for Karen.

infolabels.title: You Cain't Teach a Dead Dog New Tricks
infolabels.plot: The townspeople plan an elaborate funeral for the Foxworthys' beloved dog -- to be buried in a plot alongside one earmarked for Karen.

items.title: S02E13 - The Briarton Syndrome
items.summary: Jeff's new boss has an accident causing what appears to be a toxic spill on the loading dock -- and prompting an emergency two-day quarantine.

infolabels.title: The Briarton Syndrome
infolabels.plot: Jeff's new boss has an accident causing what appears to be a toxic spill on the loading dock -- and prompting an emergency two-day quarantine.

items.title: S02E14 - You the Man
items.summary: Jeff's victory in a "mud bogging" race makes him a hero, but things get down and dirty when his rival Mario Andretti heists his trophy.

infolabels.title: You the Man
infolabels.plot: Jeff's victory in a "mud bogging" race makes him a hero, but things get down and dirty when his rival Mario Andretti heists his trophy.

items.title: S02E15 - Big Dogs
items.summary: Bill drags Jeff along to an infomercial seminar conducted by an inspirational self-help guru with a down-home style.

infolabels.title: Big Dogs
infolabels.plot: Bill drags Jeff along to an infomercial seminar conducted by an inspirational self-help guru with a down-home style.

items.title: S02E16 - Foxworthy Shall Rise Again
items.summary: Jeff's new boss volunteers all loading-dock employees to re-enact the Civil War Battle of Briarton. Meanwhile, DMV records indicate Jeff is dead.

infolabels.title: Foxworthy Shall Rise Again
infolabels.plot: Jeff's new boss volunteers all loading-dock employees to re-enact the Civil War Battle of Briarton. Meanwhile, DMV records indicate Jeff is dead.

items.title: S02E17 - Gone Fishin'
items.summary: Karen hooks Jeff into a fishing trip with a new friend and her annoying husband.

infolabels.title: Gone Fishin'
infolabels.plot: Karen hooks Jeff into a fishing trip with a new friend and her annoying husband.

items.title: S02E18 - Mooseface Loves Nuzzles
items.summary: Jeff promises to do something romantic for Karen, but he gets sidetracked by a trip to a roadhouse with Big Jim and the boys from work -- where Jeff's chivalrous act on behalf of a waitress puts him in hot water at home.

infolabels.title: Mooseface Loves Nuzzles
infolabels.plot: Jeff promises to do something romantic for Karen, but he gets sidetracked by a trip to a roadhouse with Big Jim and the boys from work -- where Jeff's chivalrous act on behalf of a waitress puts him in hot water at home.

items.title: S02E19 - The Good, The Bad and The Hairless
items.summary: Ostracized at school after he wins the Most Courteous Student Award, Matt decides to be a prankster just like Jeff.

infolabels.title: The Good, The Bad and The Hairless
infolabels.plot: Ostracized at school after he wins the Most Courteous Student Award, Matt decides to be a prankster just like Jeff.

items.title: S02E20 - Real Men
items.summary: Karen's business trip ruins Jeff's plans for their anniversary, which he winds up spending with Bill.

infolabels.title: Real Men
infolabels.plot: Karen's business trip ruins Jeff's plans for their anniversary, which he winds up spending with Bill.

items.title: S02E21 - Wrestling Opera
items.summary: Matt talks Jeff into a night of pro wrestling to avoid a class trip to the opera.

infolabels.title: Wrestling Opera
infolabels.plot: Matt talks Jeff into a night of pro wrestling to avoid a class trip to the opera.

items.title: S02E22 - Twister of Fate
items.summary: As the Foxworthys brace for a tornado, Jeff and Karen wonder who would look after the kids if anything happened to them.

infolabels.title: Twister of Fate
infolabels.plot: As the Foxworthys brace for a tornado, Jeff and Karen wonder who would look after the kids if anything happened to them.

items.title: S02E23 - Field of Schemes
items.summary: The family attempts an upset at the company picnic against tough competitors, including Lester and Harold.
